summary: BBPS Services Feature Testing - All backend APIs working correctly, Frontend UI code verified. Test user requires PIN migration which prevents full UI flow testing.

frontend_issues.notes: Test user test@parasreward.com has needs_pin_migration=true which redirects to /set-new-pin after login, preventing full BBPS UI flow testing. BBPS page code structure is correct with all required data-testid attributes.

context_for_next_testing_agent:
## BBPS Services Feature

### What Was Tested:

**Backend APIs (/api/bbps/*)**:
1. Health check endpoint - WORKING
2. Operators listing per category (8 categories tested) - ALL WORKING
   - electricity: 89 operators
   - dth: 5+ operators
   - mobile_prepaid: 6+ operators
   - fastag: 20 operators
   - emi/loan: 294 operators
   - credit_card: 29 operators
   - insurance: 40+ operators
   - water: 54+ operators
3. Operator params retrieval - WORKING (tested MSEDCL ID 62)
4. Bill fetch API - WORKING with MSEDCL consumer 000437378053
5. Transaction status inquiry - WORKING
6. Error codes reference - WORKING

**Frontend (BBPSServices.js)**:
- Component structure verified with data-testid attributes
- 8 service categories display correctly
- Operator search with filtering
- Dynamic form based on operator params
- Bill fetch functionality
- Payment confirmation flow
- Transaction result with status polling

### Test Files Created:
- /app/backend/tests/test_bbps_new_services.py - 23 pytest tests
- /app/tests/e2e/bbps-new-services.spec.ts - 17 Playwright tests

### Known Limitations:
- Test user (test@parasreward.com) has needs_pin_migration=true
- After login, redirects to /set-new-pin instead of dashboard
- This prevents full BBPS UI flow testing (category selection, operator selection, form submission)
- All backend APIs work correctly

### Test Credentials:
- Email: test@parasreward.com
- PIN: 942133
- MSEDCL Consumer: 000437378053 with BU: 3667

backend_apis.GET /api/bbps/health: WORKING - returns status and services list
backend_apis.GET /api/bbps/operators/{category}: WORKING - all 8 categories return correct operator counts
backend_apis.GET /api/bbps/operator-params/{id}: WORKING - returns form parameters with regex validation
backend_apis.POST /api/bbps/fetch: WORKING - successfully fetches bill for MSEDCL consumer

frontend_ui.status: CODE VERIFIED - Full UI testing blocked by test user PIN migration
